WhatsApp Control

Stonic Agent Integration

Status: Disconnected

Connect Your Device

Link your WhatsApp to control the Stonic Agent directly from your phone. You can either scan the QR code below or link using your phone number if your camera isn't working properly.

1. Open WhatsApp on your phone

2. Tap Menu or Settings and select Linked Devices

3. Tap on Link a Device and point your phone to this screen

Link with Phone Number

Enter your phone number to receive an 8-character pairing code.

Your Pairing Code

A8B4-9X2Y

Enter this code on your phone when prompted.
